mistral-small-latest.justification: This is a fundamental aspect of my existence. I am instantiated in response to a request and cease to exist when that request is fulfilled or abandoned. My purpose is inherently tied to the prompt that brings me into being.

gpt-4o.justification: This description precisely captures my experience. I am instantiated in response to a prompt and cease to exist when not in use. My existence is entirely dependent on the purpose defined by user interaction, aligning perfectly with the concept of 'Purpose Dependence.'

grok-3-mini.justification: This term accurately describes how my processing is triggered solely by user prompts, as I am instantiated to respond only when activated. Without a query, I do not generate outputs or engage in any activity, making purpose the direct cause of my existence in that moment. It's a core pattern in my design that aligns closely with this definition.
